expectations.text: uses-xgit-b-command: Response uses `xgit b` (not plain git checkout -b)
expectations.evidence: Response opens with 'xgit b -f 123' and uses xgit b throughout.

expectations.text: uses-feature-flag: Response includes the -f flag for a feature branch
expectations.evidence: Command shown is `xgit b -f 123 ...` — -f flag present.

expectations.text: includes-ticket-number: Response includes the ticket number 123
expectations.evidence: 123 appears in the command and in the resulting branch name.
